output.answer: The Taurus Mountains are located at approximately 33.00°N, 36.99°E (POINT(33.001900 36.996400)), which corresponds to central Anatolia in Turkey.
output.formatted:
The Taurus Mountains are located at approximately 33.00°N, 36.99°E (POINT(33.001900 36.996400)), which corresponds to central Anatolia in Turkey.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?coordinate WHERE {
  wd:Q172556 wdt:P625 ?coordinate
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| coordinate                                  |
| ------------------------------------------- |
| POINT(33.001900 36.996400) (geo:wktLiteral) |
